parts.prompt:
Identify ONE technological development that contributed to Europeans’ ability to spread religious
ideas in the Americas during the period 1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE way that religion contributed to the process of state expansion and/or exploration in the
Americas during the period 1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE reason why syncretic belief systems developed in the Americas during the period
1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.
